steps.title: Identify the established time frame
steps.content: The passage opens with “was a period” and “during the 1930s,” establishing a historical past. The next sentence uses “reached” (past tense). All temporal markers point to the past.

steps.title: Apply past tense to match the time frame
steps.content: Past events require past tense verbs. “affected” (choice D) is simple past, correctly describing the dust storms' action during the Dust Bowl. The other choices describe present progressive (A), future (C), or future perfect (B), contradicting the historical context. That matches choice D — D is correct.
